name: Smoke test: splash renders in the preview harness. Verifies the dev-tools server is serving the app and the splash screen mounts. Safe to run on a fresh clone.

steps._comment: Reset state - every test starts with this

steps.expression: (() => { const b = document.querySelector('button'); if (!b) throw new Error('no launch button rendered'); return 'launch button present: ' + b.textContent.trim(); })()
